ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecular_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular structure */,
  "equivalence_class" INTEGER /* ID of the equivalence class */,
  "representative" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the molecular structure */,
  "nts" INTEGER /* Number of nucleotides in the structure */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the molecular structure */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the molecular structure */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the molecular structure is derived */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the molecular structure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the molecular structure was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the molecular structure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_structures_representative FOREIGN KEY ("representative") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_structures_equivalence_class FOREIGN KEY ("equivalence_class") REFERENCES equivalence_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equivalence_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equivalence class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the equivalence class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equivalence class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the equivalence class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the equivalence class was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the equivalence class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "pdb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PDB entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the representative was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the representative was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the representative */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution associated with the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class member */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the class member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the class member was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the class member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_members_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES molecular_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_value" REAL /* Value of the resolution */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the resolution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resolution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resolution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nts" (
  "nts_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number of nucleotides */,
  "nts_value" INTEGER /* Value of the number of nucleotides */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the number of nucleotides was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the number of nucleotides was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nts_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdb_entries" (
  "pdb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDB entry */,
  "pdb_name" TEXT /* Name of the PDB entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PDB entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the PDB entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the PDB entry was last updated */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution associated with the PDB entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pdb_entries_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the molecular structure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecular structure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES molecular_structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_structures" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular structure */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the molecular structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES molecular_structures ("structure_id")
)
